title: Why Is Universal Health Services (UHS) Down 5.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Buy Universal Health Services To Add A Layer Of Resiliency To Portfolios
text: Universal Health Services continues to offer compelling value on the profitability and defensive front. Whilst returns are flat in the name, UHS is a low gamma solution that adds a layer of resiliency to equity portfolios.
